topic: multi-step distance problem with fractions, distance-time-rate
latex:
Nathaniel and his family are visiting family in another part of the country. They decided that they would take the scenic route, taking a three-day road trip.
\begin{itemize}
\item On Tuesday they drove at an average speed of $40$ mph for $4$ hours.
\item On Wednesday they drove at an average speed of $55$ mph for $2$ hours.
\item On Thursday they drove at an average speed of $60$ mph for $2\frac{1}{2}$ times as long as on Wednesday.
\end{itemize}
What was the total distance traveled?
